diagrams.title: Multicast vs Unicast Topology
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how unicast sends separate copies to each receiver while multicast creates a tree structure
diagrams.purpose: Understand bandwidth efficiency of multicast over unicast

diagrams.title: RPB/RPF Check Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision process for RPF check showing how routers validate incoming multicast packets
elements: Check: Arrived on interface toward source?
diagrams.purpose: Visualize loop prevention mechanism in multicast routing

diagrams.title: Shared Tree vs Source Tree
diagrams.description: Two topologies comparing shared tree (RP-centered) vs source-specific tree (direct paths from source)
diagrams.purpose: Understand trade-offs between scalability and optimal routing

diagrams.title: MOSPF Packet Flow
diagrams.description: Message flow showing group membership advertisement and multicast tree computation in MOSPF
diagrams.purpose: Understand MOSPF operation and on-demand route calculation

diagrams.title: MBONE Tunnel Architecture
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how multicast islands connect through tunnels across non-multicast networks
diagrams.purpose: Understand how multicast traverses heterogeneous networks

visuals.title: Multicasting Routing Mospf
visuals.description: Visual diagram for multicasting routing mospf
